title: naba' #5012
definition:
1) to prophesy
    1a) (Niphal)
        1a1) to prophesy
             1a1a) under influence of divine spirit
             1a1b) of false prophets
    1b) (Hithpael)
        1b1) to prophesy
             1b1a) under influence of divine spirit
             1b1b) of false prophets
